positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~grew_up_in_health_home(taylor)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~disregard_physical_wellbeing(taylor)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~grew_up_in_health_home(X0) | eats_salads_regularly(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~eats_salads_regularly(X0) | very_conscious(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~disregard_physical_wellbeing(X0) | ~very_conscious(X0)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~eats_salads_regularly(taylor)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define fulfills_nutritional_intake(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define visits_gym_at_least_once_a_day(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
